What We Offer

Treatments Designed to Restore You

Each modality is selected and applied based on your body's specific needs — combining ancient technique with modern recovery tools.

Assisted Stretching

Guided, practitioner-led stretching that restores range of motion and decompresses tight joints — far more effective than solo stretching.

$100 / session

IASTM / Scraping Therapy

Instrument-assisted soft tissue mobilization breaks down fascial restrictions and scar tissue, accelerating healing and reducing chronic tightness.

Included in session

Smart Cupping + Red Light

Dynamic cupping with integrated red light therapy boosts circulation, reduces inflammation, and accelerates deep-tissue recovery.

Included in session

Heated Muscle Scraping

The Achedaway heated scraper combines IASTM technique with therapeutic heat for superior myofascial release and pain relief.

Included in session

Percussive Therapy

Theragun deep-tissue percussion targets neuromuscular tension, flushing out metabolic waste and improving muscle response post-treatment.

Included in session

Vibration Foam Rolling

High-frequency vibration combined with foam rolling supercharges warm-up and cool-down, priming muscles for performance or recovery.

Included in session

About the Practice

Personalized Care, Real Results

NguyenWellnessRecovery is a Bridgeport, Connecticut–based wellness practice specializing in assisted stretching and hands-on tissue work designed to improve mobility, relieve tension, and support overall recovery.

My approach combines guided stretching with targeted manual techniques — IASTM, cupping, percussive therapy, and red light therapy — to help clients restore movement, reduce muscle tightness, and enhance physical performance.

I work with a wide range of individuals: desk professionals experiencing everyday stiffness, athletes seeking improved flexibility and faster recovery, and anyone ready to invest in how their body feels and moves. Every session is personalized to your needs.

Assisted Stretching IASTM Cupping Therapy Red Light Therapy Percussive Therapy Recovery Specialist
